title: C919 E-TRAS — TLS lock sensor failure blocks deploy chain
description: tls:sensor_fail forces tls_locked=True / tls_unlocked=False permanently. unlock_confirmed requires tls_unlocked=True (per §5.7 lock aggregation), so even though the rest of the deploy chain progresses (CMD2/CMD3 fire), unlock_confirmed never asserts → fadec_deploy_command never fires → state machine cannot leave S3_TRCU_POWER_ON. This is the failure mode that the v2.0 PLS-as-primary-lock spec was specifically designed to mitigate (FaultClass-D, lock-sensor disagreement).

events.note: TLS unlock sensors stuck reporting locked from t=0
TRA inside SW1 window (-6.2..-1.4°) → CMD2 fires; only the lock readback is broken
unlock_confirmed dead (TLS frozen) → deploy never fires
primary contract: TLS sensor failure freezes unlock_confirmed at False
